Feature_Name: F1AP UE Context Setup for Inter-gNB-DU LTM Handover
Feature_Description: This procedure involves the gNB-CU preparing and sending an F1AP 'UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST' message to a candidate gNB-DU. The candidate gNB-DU then responds with an F1AP 'UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE' message, which is handled by the gNB-CU for the purpose of Inter-gNB-DU LTM handover. The LTM configuration procedures are performed between gNB-CU and candidate gNB-DUs, and between gNB-CU and source gNB-DU as part of the overall LTM process.
Feature_Objectives: To establish the UE context in the candidate gNB-DU.
To facilitate the Inter-gNB-DU LTM handover procedure.
To enable the gNB-CU to handle the response for LTM handover.
Procedure_Implementation_Steps: The gNB-CU prepares and sends the F1AP 'UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST' message to the candidate gNB-DU.
The candidate gNB-DU processes the request and responds with the F1AP 'UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE' message.
The gNB-CU handles the F1AP 'UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE' message to complete the Inter-gNB-DU LTM handover.
